message:
perf(framebuffer): stride==1 blit full-coverage fast path (bd-4yonz)

When stride==1, blit_to_painter covers every painter pixel. Call
painter.mark_full_coverage() once and use set_color_at_index_in_bounds
in the inner loop to skip per-pixel generation-stamp checks/writes.
When stride>1, keep existing point_colored_at_index_in_bounds path.

Validated: 103 doom/quake framebuffer tests pass, golden hash registry
(metaballs, plasma, doom-e1m1, quake-e1m1, mandelbrot) all pass —
output is bit-identical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
